use_cases: Displaying images with descriptive captions in gallery layouts
Showcasing blog post thumbnails with short descriptions
Presenting portfolio or project items with brief text
Creating media grids with consistent styling across image cards
Adding simple image showcases to landing pages or product features
ai_summary: A lightweight, semantic image card component using HTML5 figure/figcaption elements with a fixed 250px width. Features a 4:3 aspect ratio image container, rounded corners with subtle border and shadow styling, and a caption area below the image. Built with Tailwind CSS using a base theme system for consistent theming across design systems. Perfect for creating uniform image grids or media galleries with minimal configuration.
